innovation_1.name: 基于类MRI角度频域分析的光场材质感知机制
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that material characteristics in light fields can be explicitly decoupled and understood using an MRI-like angular frequency domain analysis.

innovation_2.name: 双掩码物理调制与BRDF参数解析模型
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a dual-mask physical modulation model that accurately and analytically parses BRDF parameters based on this frequency-domain observation.

innovation_3.name: 分量感知与置信度加权的统一深度估计策略
innovation_3.contribution_statement: We demonstrate that incorporating these parsed material components via a confidence-weighted strategy significantly improves the accuracy and robustness of unified depth estimation.
